notes: AE and AL series are legacy/discontinued product lines. Their technical documentation is locked behind the Aristarco reserved member area (https://www.aristarco.it/area-riservata/). No public-facing product pages exist for these models. The 2022 General Catalogue (WASH) covers only current series: AF Fusion, AS Superior, AH Hood-Type, AR Rack Conveyor, AFX Flight Conveyor, AU Utensil.

products.name: AE 35.21
products.description: Legacy glasswasher/dishwasher model from the Aristarco AE series. Technical documentation is available only through the Aristarco reserved member area and is not publicly accessible.
products.availability_notes: Product page not found on public website. AE series absent from 2022 General Catalogue. Documentation behind login wall at https://www.aristarco.it/area-riservata/
